<<BREAK DOWN THE ORIGINAL PROMPT>>

MODULE 3: DATA COLLECTION AND ANALYSIS  
MODULE 4: HYPOTHESIS TESTING AND REJECTION CRITERIA

MODULE 3: OUTLINES THE DATA COLLECTION PROCESS AND ANALYSIS METHODS
